channel.title: Avgo on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Avgo on Archive 03

item.title: 140% Surge in AI Chip Revenue: Analyzing Broadcom (AVGO)'s Impressive Momentum
item.description: An in-depth analysis of Broadcom (AVGO), a key player in AI infrastructure accumulating wealth in Nvidia’s shadow. Along with Mew, Kurumi, and Mikael, we explore the strengths of its business model—dominating data center networking and producing custom ASIC chips for Google and Meta—while examining potential risks like high customer concentration and VMware churn.
